name: N. Leventeris S.A.
summary: N. Leventeris S.A. manufactures and sells wires and wire ropes in Greece. The company offers steel wires, steel wire ropes, combination ropes, fiber and mooring ropes, wire rope slings, chains, anchors, fiber slings, crosby products, and agricultural wire ropes, as well as accessories comprising hooks, turnbuckles, shackles, and wire rope thimbles. It also provides mooring, synthetic, and natural fiber ropes. N. Leventeris S.A. was founded in 1948 and is headquartered in Piraeus, Greece.
